Atty. ALLEN FEGHALI, Esq. of Moon & Yang, APC (Tel: 213-232-3128) for plaintiffs;
Atty. WILLIAM C. SUNG, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (Tel: 213-250-1800) for defendants Argent Hotel Management, LLC, and Highgate Hotels, L.P.

FINAL FAIRNESS HEARING.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court notes that no one is present at today's hearing to object. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

(See the ruling on plaintiffs' motion which is also on calendar today.)

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/CK)

Plaintiffs' Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-09-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALLEN FEGHALI, Esq. of Moon & Yang, APC (Tel: 213-232-3128) for plaintiffs;
Atty. WILLIAM C. SUNG, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (Tel: 213-250-1800) for defendants Argent Hotel Management, LLC, and Highgate Hotels, L.P.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS KHAWLA MAJDOUB, and HUMBERTO MUNOZ's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court notes that no one is present at today's hearing to object. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion is granted. The parties must provide a new proposed order and judgment as follows:
-Two separate documents are required;
-An electronic version of the two documents should be sent to department611@sftc.org;
-The judgment may incorporate the order by reference;
-The order and judgment must each state the name of the opt-out and the judgment must state that person is not bound by the judgment;
-Order:
-The incentive payments are $5000;
-The order must state the number of (i) class members (ii) optouts and (iii) objectors
-Paragraph 21 of the current proposed order: The date the report is due must be filled in. This paragraph should read: "Plaintiffs' counsel must file a final report and declaration stating the distribution of all settlement funds not later than ___, 2023. The report must be filed and a paper courtesy copy must be provided to Department 611 (Judge Curtis Karnow)."

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/CK)

William Sung, Esq. (213.250.1800; william.sung@lewisbrisbois.com) of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP for Defendants.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF KHAWLA MAJDOUB'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is approved. Final Fairness Hearing is set for September 9, 2022 at 9:30am, Law and Motion Dept 302.

Order is signed.
